nasb.text: Esau said, “Please let me leave with you some of the people who are with me.” But he said, “What need is there? Let me find favor in the sight of my lord.”

esv.text: So Esau said, “Let me leave with you some of the people who are with me.” But he said, “What need is there? Let me find favor in the sight of my lord.”

cnv.text: 以掃說：“讓我把跟隨我的人留幾個在你這裡吧。”雅各說：“為甚麼要這樣呢？只要我得我主的喜悅就是了。”

ccb.text: 以扫说：“让我给你留几个帮手吧。”雅各说：“不用了，能得到我主的恩待就够了。”

csbs.text: 以扫就说：“让我把一些跟随我的人留在你这里吧。” 雅各却说：“何必如此呢？愿我在我主眼前蒙恩。”
